svg.text: EGAP v3.4.0 — Genome Assembly Pipeline Flow
Raw Reads → Preprocessing & QC → Decontamination → Assembly → Polishing → Curation → Final Assembly
FastQC · NanoPlot · BBMap insert-size — read quality metrics generated
Reads assessed before assembly; stats embedded in final QC report
Classifies ONT & PacBio long reads against a reference k-mer database
✔ Kept: reads matching target domain (eukarya / bacteria / archaea) + unclassified
ℹ Step skipped gracefully when KRAKEN2_DB is not configured
③ ASSEMBLY (all applicable assemblers run in parallel)
BUSCO / Compleasm (2 lineages: primary + secondary) · QUAST (N50, contig count, GC%)
All assemblies ranked → best completeness + contiguity selected for polishing
Intermediate k-mer dirs, PAF files & temp FASTAs cleaned up by file_manager
Classifies every contig in the curated assembly by taxonomic origin
✔ Kept: contigs matching target organism class (e.g. eukarya for fungi)
✔ Non-target contigs (e.g. bacterial) removed and archived
BUSCO / Compleasm (2 lineages) · QUAST (N50, L50, contig count, GC%)
Assembly graded → AMAZING · GREAT · OK · POOR
Compleasm lineage downloads cleaned up by file_manager after run
EGAP v3.4.0 · Entheome Genome Assembly Pipeline · github.com/iPsychonaut/EGAP
